# Sajiv Francis

> Enterprise Architect and AI platform builder. I lead large-scale SAP S/4HANA
> programs, practice TOGAF/ArchiMate enterprise architecture, and design and
> ship AI-native platforms — including retrieval-augmented (RAG) and agent
> systems. This site hosts my writing, a working RAG chat grounded in my own
> architecture notes and published work, browser-first architecture tools, and
> reference documentation.

## About
- [About Sajiv Francis](https://sajivfrancis.com/about): Background and focus — Enterprise Architect leading AI programs at a Fortune 100 technology company; SAP S/4HANA, TOGAF, and AI-native platforms.

## Writing
- [Blog](https://sajivfrancis.com/blog): Essays on the intersection of AI and enterprise-architecture practice.
- [News](https://sajivfrancis.com/news): Curated reading across SAP, Enterprise Architecture, AI, and software engineering.

## Build & Tools
- [Tools](https://sajivfrancis.com/tools): Browser-first document and architecture tools (PDF, Markdown, diagram pipelines) — files are processed locally, nothing is uploaded.
- [EA Explorer (Lab)](https://sajivfrancis.com/lab/ea-explorer): Interactive enterprise-architecture exploration.

## Chat & Docs
- [RAG Chat](https://sajivfrancis.com/chat): A retrieval-grounded chat over my architecture notes and published writing — Cloudflare Workers + Postgres/pgvector + Anthropic Claude.
- [Documentation](https://docs.sajivfrancis.com): Reference docs and architecture deep-dives.

## Machine-readable
- [RAG Chat OpenAPI spec](https://sajivfrancis.com/openapi.yaml): The chat API endpoint, for agent crawlers and tooling.

## Expertise
SAP S/4HANA · Enterprise Architecture · TOGAF · ArchiMate · AI-native platforms · Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) · agent systems · AI platform engineering.
